title: Deckers (DECK) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates, HOKA Brand Aids
text: Deckers' (DECK) second-quarter top-line growth reflects strength in the HOKA ONE ONE brand.

title: Deckers Stock Falls After Disappointing Forecast
text: The maker of Ugg boots and Hoka running shoes reports strong quarterly sales but maintains fiscal-year guidance.

title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE:DECK ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Erinn Kohler - Vice President, Investor Relations & Corporate Planning Dave Powers - President & Chief Executive Officer Steve Fasching - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Laurent Vasilescu - Exane BNP Tom Nikic - Wedbush Securities Jon Komp - Baird Jay Sole - UBS Sam Poser - Williams Trading Dana Telsey - Telsey Advisory Group Jim Duffy - Stifel Operator Good afternoon, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Deckers Brands Second Quarter fiscal 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Deckers (DECK) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Deckers (DECK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.83% and 8.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: DECKERS BRANDS REPORTS SECOND QUARTER FISCAL 2023 FINANCIAL RESULTS
text: Second Quarter Fiscal 2023 Reported Revenue was $876 million, Increasing 21% Compared to the Same Period Last Year and 25% in Constant Currency Fiscal Year 2023 Revenue Growth Guide of 10-11% Reiterated on a Reported Basis Fiscal Year 2023 Diluted EPS Guide of $17.50-$18.35 Reiterated on a Reported Basis GOLETA, Calif. , Oct. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing, and distributing innovative footwear, apparel, and accessories, today announced financial results for the second quarter ended September 30, 2022.

title: UGG OPENS THE DOORS TO FIRST 'FEEL HOUSE' IN WILLIAMSBURG, BROOKLYN
text: BRAND INTRODUCES A NEW MULTI-SENSORY RETAIL CONCEPT DEDICATED TO MAKING SELF-EXPRESSION COMFORTABLE FOR ALL HIGH-RES CONTENT Credit: UGG® SANTA BARBARA, Calif. , Oct. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southern California-based global lifestyle brand UGG® (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) proudly launched Feel House is a multi-sensory community space dedicated to making self-expression comfortable for all.

title: Deckers Outdoor's Solid Growth Hampered by Expense Headwinds
text: Many Americans in recent decades have made the leap to wear Ugg boots at some point in their lives, often at the point of criticism or ridicule. Originally a sheepskin boot founded in Australia, it historically has global appeal for both fashion and practicality.

title: Deckers' (DECK) Teva Ties Up With Macy's & UNWRP Before Holiday
text: Deckers' (DECK) Teva forms a partnership with Macy's. The brand also unveils the Teva x UNWRP holiday capsule.

title: Deckers (DECK) Lined Up for Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Deckers' (DECK) second-quarter fiscal 2023 results are likely to reflect strength in the HOKA ONE ONE brand.

title: Teva Unveils Holiday Partnership with UNWRP and Macy's
text: The original sport sandal brand links up with designer Ashley London Fouyolle of UNWRP on a limited-edition holiday footwear design for the whole family GOLETA, Calif. , Oct. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Teva ®, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), announces the launch of its Artist Series Collaboration in partnership with Macy's, with the unveiling of the Teva x UNWRP holiday capsule.

title: Deckers Brands Announces Conference Call to Review Second Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Results
text: GOLETA, Calif. , Oct. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing and distributing innovative footwear, apparel and accessories, today announced that the Company's conference call to review second quarter fiscal 2023 results will be on Thursday, October 27 th, 2022 at approximately 4:30 pm Eastern Time.

title: UGG LAUNCHES FIRST-EVER CLASSIC BOOT MADE WITH REGENERATIVELY SOURCED MATERIALS
text: BRAND WILL CONTRIBUTE TWENTY ACRES OF GRASSLAND TO REGENERATIVE FARMLAND WITH EACH PURCHASE OF THE NEW CLASSIC MINI REGENERATE BOOT  SANTA BARBARA, Calif. , Oct. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Evolving its Classic Boot silhouette with the environment in mind, Southern California-based global lifestyle brand UGG® (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) continues its purpose-driven journey towards a more regenerative world by unveiling its new Classic Mini Regenerate.

title: Auto Parts Leader Rises Near Buy Point As Commercial Sales Surge
text: AutoZone made a big push in the commercial market and those efforts are paying off. AZO stock is a way to play both offense and defense.

title: Footwear Stocks: A Buy During Market Correction And Recession?
text: Crocs and Deckers are two footwear stocks that could stand out even amid a market downturn and recession. The post Footwear Stocks: A Buy During Market Correction And Recession?
